title: Bauer 39189 Facial Hair Remover for Women | Face Shaver and Mini Face Epilator | Built in LED Light | Discreet/Compact/Lightweight | Upper Lip, Cheek, Chin, Hair Remover
features: PAINLESS HAIR REMOVER – This battery operated, handheld facial hair remover for women is a multi-purpose shaver that is easy to use, provides painless hair removal, and is suitable for all skin types. Perfect for discrete removal of upper lip hair, as wel as chin and cheek hair.

MULTI-PURPOSE – This ladies flawless facial hair remover is not only suitable for the removal of fine facial hairs but can also be used on arms, underarms, legs and bikini lines. It is also waterproof to IPX4 standards, making it suitable to be used in the shower.

COMPACT DESIGN – This facial hair removal epilator has a stylish and discreet design and is lightweight and compact making it the perfect size to fit into a makeup bag and be taken away on weekend trips or overseas holidays. There is also a built in LED light which is able to magnify the finest of hairs making the removal of stubborn facial hair even easier.

DETACHABLE HEAD – The tip of this facial hair remover detaches effortlessly making cleaning the machine under a running tap or with a fine brush quick and simple. The hair trimmer is battery operated and requires 1 x AA battery (not included).

BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Bauer Professional is leading the way in the manufacturing of innovate and high-quality hair and beauty goods for both women and men. From hair dryers, straighteners and curlers to skin cleanser brushes, shavers and vanity mirrors, you can find whatever you need to enhance your beauty regime. This ladies facial hair remover is the perfect size to be used on the go whenever you require a smooth finish to your skin. Not only is it perfect to be used when removing unwanted facial hair but it can also be used on legs, arms, underarms, and on your bikini lines too. The hair removal device is waterproof up to IPX4 standard meaning it is capable of being used in the shower without compromise to its quality. The tip of this ladies facial hair remover detaches easily allowing for a quick and easy cleaning process. The facial hair remover is battery operated and requires 1 x AA battery (not included). This facial hair remover is the perfect size and style to fit into a makeup bag and be taken away on holidays or weekends away without drawing attention to its primary function. Safety Warning Always use the product with caution and follow the instructions provided. Keep the product away from water while charging. Always remove the battery before cleaning the product. Never use the product on broken or irritated skin. Keep the product out of reach of children and pets. Always supervise children when using the product. Always replace the battery cap securely after inserting the battery to prevent accidental contact with the battery.
